waiind 0.0.0.9000

Aggregate a predictor data frame to quarterly frequency

Source: R/date-utils.R
aggregate_predictor_to_quarterly.Rd

Aggregates a time/value data frame to quarters by mean, by the cut-off month, or by the last observation of the cut-off month.

Usage

aggregate_predictor_to_quarterly(
  df,
  cut_off_month_pos = NULL,
  method = "cut_off"
)

Arguments

df

Data frame with time (Date) and value columns.

cut_off_month_pos

Integer position of the cut-off month within the quarter (used by methods "last_month" and "last").

method

One of "last_month", "mean", "last".

Value

A quarterly data frame (columns depend on method).

Details

Warning: this function dispatches on the name of the object passed as df: if the deparsed argument name contains "AR", the data frame is returned with only a yearqtr column added. This legacy behavior is kept for compatibility with the analysis scripts; avoid renaming objects passed to it.

Examples

df <- data.frame(time = seq(as.Date("2023-01-01"), by = "month", length.out = 12),
                 value = rnorm(12))
aggregate_predictor_to_quarterly(df, cut_off_month_pos = 1, method = "mean")
#> # A tibble: 4 × 3
#>   time         value yearqtr  
#>   <date>       <dbl> <yearqtr>
#> 1 2023-01-01 -1.19   2023 Q1  
#> 2 2023-04-01  0.588  2023 Q2  
#> 3 2023-07-01 -0.771  2023 Q3  
#> 4 2023-10-01 -0.0691 2023 Q4
